calendar.matters: Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Continued To Jan-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Boyes for petitioner Sarita Britt (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for trustee Sylvia Britt (via Zoom).

The matter came on for hearing on petition to invalidate the trust.

Counsel reported that written discovery had been completed, but depositions had not yet taken place. The parties had attended one mediation session and remain open to the possibility of returning if necessary. Counsel requested a continuance of 120 days to allow further settlement discussions and to avoid scheduling conflicts during the holiday season.

The Court continued the matter to January 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Continued To Sep-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Boyes for and with Sarita Britt, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for Sylvia Britt, Respondent (via Zoom).

Ms. Boyes reported that the parties attended mediation and may return for further mediation. Discovery is ongoing, with written discovery completed, but depositions remain outstanding. Counsel estimated that additional time is needed before returning to mediation.

The court continued the matter to June 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Counsel shall file a joint status report by June 11, 2025. Ms. Boyes was instructed to take the lead in preparing in filing the status report.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Mar-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for Sylvia Britt, Respondent (via Zoom).
Patricia Boyes for Sarita Britt, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Counsel report that the parties are still engaged in discovery and require additional time to complete depositions and responses to discovery requests. The court continues the matter to March 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time to complete discovery and possibly pursue mediation or other resolutions.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Sep-10-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Boyes appeared by zoom for and with Sarita Britt by zoom.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Silvia Britt by zoom.

Mrs. Boyes stated that she is willing to return to mediation after obtaining some additional information. Mrs. Ebey stated that she needs to do some discovery and that she needs time to do a motion for summary adjudication. Further discussion was held regarding a three-day trial and the trial being scheduled in Department 206. Status of mediation is off calendar. The Petition to Invalidate the Trust is continued to December 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court encouraged the parties to continue discussing resolution and advised Mrs. Ebey to file her motion sooner rather than later.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: N. Ng. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Sep-10-2024 Continued To Dec-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate The Rosemary Brown Living Trust Dated June 3, 2023
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Sep-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Boyes appeared by zoom for SArita Britt.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Silvia Britt (respondent).

The court asked if the parties have met and conferred regarding resolution. The Parties stated that they are willing to go to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 12, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 3, 2024. The Petition to Invalidate the Trust dated June 3, 2023 is continued to and the Parties are to return on September 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties are to obtain a copy of the mediation order from the court's website.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
